# SlicedLabs OS тАФ System Keybindings

Every keybind, every tool. Open the live searchable console with `Mod+Alt+K`. Generated from `system/keys.toml`.

## Tools

- [niri](#niri)
- [slicedlabs](#slicedlabs)

## niri

### Launch

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `Mod+Return` | Open a terminal (ghostty тЖТ zellij) |
| `Mod+Space` | App launcher (wofi drun) |
| `Mod+Alt+Space` | Command palette тАФ all workstation actions |
| `Mod+Alt+S` | SlicedLabs mission-control TUI (floating) |
| `Mod+Alt+E` | Open the [ENGINE] repo in a terminal |
| `Mod+Alt+P` | Music cockpit (mpd / rmpc ┬╖ SomaFM radio) |

### Focus

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `Mod+H` | Focus column left |
| `Mod+L` | Focus column right |
| `Mod+J` | Focus window down |
| `Mod+K` | Focus window up |
| `Mod+Tab` | Cycle forward (window / column) |
| `Mod+Shift+Tab` | Cycle backward (window / column) |

### Move

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `Mod+Shift+H` | Move column left |
| `Mod+Shift+L` | Move column right |
| `Mod+Shift+J` | Move window down |
| `Mod+Shift+K` | Move window up |
| `Mod+Shift+V` | Move column тЖТ media (mnemonic) |

### Window

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `Mod+Q` | Close focused window |
| `Mod+F` | Fullscreen window |
| `Mod+W` | Toggle floating |

### Layout

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `Mod+Shift+F` | Maximize column |
| `Mod+R` | Cycle column width (┬╝ тЖТ тЕУ тЖТ ┬╜ тЖТ тЕФ) |
| `Mod+Comma` | Consume window into column |
| `Mod+Period` | Expel window from column |

### Workspace

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `Mod+1` | Workspace: coding |
| `Mod+2` | Workspace: research |
| `Mod+3` | Workspace: engine |
| `Mod+4` | Workspace: browser |
| `Mod+5` | Workspace: monitoring |
| `Mod+6` | Workspace: streaming |
| `Mod+7` | Workspace: gaming |
| `Mod+8` | Workspace: media |
| `Mod+9` | Workspace: desk (blank ┬╖ portrait DP-3) |
| `Mod+E` | Workspace: engine (mnemonic) |
| `Mod+C` | Workspace: research (mnemonic) |
| `Mod+M` | Workspace: monitoring (mnemonic) |
| `Mod+D` | Workspace: coding / Develop (mnemonic) |
| `Mod+B` | Workspace: browser (mnemonic) |
| `Mod+V` | Workspace: media (mnemonic) |
| `Mod+G` | Gaming: focus workspace, or actions menu if already there |
| `Mod+Shift+1` | Move column тЖТ coding |
| `Mod+Shift+2` | Move column тЖТ research |
| `Mod+Shift+3` | Move column тЖТ engine |
| `Mod+Shift+4` | Move column тЖТ browser |
| `Mod+Shift+5` | Move column тЖТ monitoring |
| `Mod+Shift+6` | Move column тЖТ streaming |
| `Mod+Shift+7` | Move column тЖТ gaming |
| `Mod+Shift+8` | Move column тЖТ media |
| `Mod+Shift+9` | Move column тЖТ desk |
| `Mod+Shift+E` | Move column тЖТ engine (mnemonic) |
| `Mod+Shift+C` | Move column тЖТ research (mnemonic) |
| `Mod+Shift+M` | Move column тЖТ monitoring (mnemonic) |
| `Mod+Shift+D` | Move column тЖТ coding (mnemonic) |
| `Mod+Shift+B` | Move column тЖТ browser (mnemonic) |

### Scene

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `Mod+Ctrl+E` | Stage scene: engine |
| `Mod+Ctrl+D` | Stage scene: coding |
| `Mod+Ctrl+C` | Stage scene: research |
| `Mod+Ctrl+B` | Stage scene: browser |
| `Mod+Ctrl+V` | Stage scene: media (Spotify) |
| `Mod+Ctrl+M` | Stage scene: monitoring |
| `Mod+Ctrl+S` | Stage scene: streaming |
| `Mod+Ctrl+Shift+G` | Stage scene: gaming |

### HUD

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `Mod+Slash` | Cockpit тШ░ command menu |
| `Mod+Alt+K` | Keybindings console тАФ every key, searchable |
| `Mod+Alt+C` | Control Center тАФ toggles ┬╖ sliders ┬╖ stats ┬╖ media ┬╖ power |
| `Mod+Alt+I` | HUD inspector: focused workspace context |
| `Mod+Alt+M` | HUD inspector: media / leisure hub |
| `Mod+Alt+N` | HUD inspector: network / VPN / security |
| `Mod+Alt+A` | HUD inspector: AI team / spend |
| `Mod+Alt+T` | HUD inspector: agenda / standup |
| `Mod+Alt+Y` | HUD inspector: system |

### Appearance

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `Mod+Alt+L` | Toggle dark / light (hot-reloads) |
| `Mod+Shift+W` | Random wallpaper |

### Screenshot

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `Print` | Screenshot (region picker) |
| `Shift+Print` | Screenshot whole screen |
| `Mod+Shift+S` | Screenshot (region) тАФ ergonomic trigger |

### Session

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `Mod+Escape` | Lock screen |
| `Mod+Shift+Escape` | Power menu (lock/suspend/logout/reboot/shutdown) |
| `Mod+BackSpace` | Dismiss all notifications |
| `Mod+Shift+Q` | Quit niri (exit session) |
| `Mod+Shift+Slash` | niri's built-in hotkey overlay (legacy; prefer Mod+Alt+K) |

### Audio

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `XF86AudioRaiseVolume` | Volume up |
| `XF86AudioLowerVolume` | Volume down |
| `XF86AudioMute` | Mute output |
| `XF86AudioMicMute` | Mute microphone |

### Gaming

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `Mod+Shift+G` | Gaming launcher menu (Steam/Lutris/Heroic/BottlesтАж) |
| `Mod+Ctrl+G` | Toggle GameMode hold |
| `Mod+F12` | Toggle MangoHud overlay (sends F12) |

## slicedlabs

### Tabs

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `Ctrl+1` | Tab: Chat |
| `Ctrl+2` | Tab: Agents |
| `Ctrl+3` | Tab: Cost |
| `Ctrl+4` | Tab: Audit |
| `Ctrl+5` | Tab: Memory |
| `Ctrl+6` | Tab: Control |

### Action

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `Ctrl+P` | Command palette |
| `Ctrl+Q` | Quit the TUI |

## ghostty

### Terminal

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `Ctrl+Shift+R` | Reload ghostty config |
| `Ctrl+Shift+N` | New window |
| `Ctrl+Shift+C` | Copy selection |
| `Ctrl+Shift+V` | Paste |

## zellij

### Modes

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `Ctrl+p` | Pane mode |
| `Ctrl+t` | Tab mode |
| `Ctrl+n` | Resize mode |
| `Ctrl+s` | Scroll / search mode |
| `Ctrl+o` | Session mode |
| `Ctrl+g` | Lock mode (pass keys through) |

### Panes

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `Alt+n` | New pane |
| `Alt+h / Alt+l` | Focus pane left / right |
| `Alt+j / Alt+k` | Focus pane down / up |
| `Alt+f` | Toggle floating panes |
| `Alt+= / Alt+-` | Resize pane grow / shrink |

## nvim

### Find

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `Space Space` | Find files (root dir) |
| `Space /` | Live grep (search in files) |
| `Space e` | File explorer (neo-tree) |
| `Space ,` | Switch buffer |

### Buffers

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `Shift+H / Shift+L` | Previous / next buffer |
| `Space b d` | Delete buffer |

### Git

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `Space g g` | Lazygit (root dir) |

### LSP

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `g d` | Go to definition |
| `K` | Hover documentation |
| `Space c a` | Code action |
| `Space c f` | Format buffer |

### Session

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `Space q q` | Quit all |

## lazygit

### Navigate

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `1 тАж 5` | Switch panel (status/files/branches/commits/stash) |
| `?` | Help (all keybinds) |

### Stage

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `Space` | Stage / unstage file |
| `a` | Stage all |

### Commit

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `c` | Commit |

### Sync

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `P` | Push |
| `p` | Pull |

### History

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `z` | Undo |

## rmpc

### Transport

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `p` | Play / pause |
| `> / <` | Next / previous track |
| `s` | Stop |
| `, / .` | Volume down / up |

### Navigate

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `1 / 2 / 3` | Tabs: Queue / Directories / Search |
| `q` | Quit |

## gh-dash

### Navigate

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `j / k` | Move down / up |
| `Tab` | Next section |
| `Enter` | Open item |
| `/` | Search |

## fish

### Command

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `sl` | Open the SlicedLabs TUI inline (= slicedlabs) |
| `cb` | cargo build + write Waybar build status |
